hero.title: Your tourists get instant answers.
hero.subtitle: AI chatbot for travel agencies — answers client questions 24/7 via Telegram & WhatsApp using your trip data.

features.title: Everything your agency needs
features.subtitle: One platform to automate tourist communication and save your managers' time.

ai.title: AI-Powered Answers
ai.description: Gemini AI reads trip details — flights, hotels, transfers — and answers tourist questions instantly in any language.

telegram.title: Telegram Bot
telegram.description: Tourists message your bot and get accurate answers about their trip. No app installs, no extra logins.

voice.title: Voice Messages
voice.description: Tourists send voice messages — Whisper transcribes, AI responds. Natural conversation, zero friction.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Automated reminders: before departure, check-in, transfer pickup, return flight. Fully customizable schedule.

chat.title: Operator Chat
chat.description: When AI can't answer — managers step in directly from the admin panel. Seamless handoff, full history.

multilang.title: Multilingual
multilang.description: AI responds in the tourist's language. Trip data in one language, answers in another — automatic translation.

demo.title: See Trip Assistant in Action
demo.subtitle: Watch how a tourist asks a question and gets an instant AI-powered answer.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 14 days. No credit card required.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For small agencies just getting started

pro.name: Professional
pro.description: For growing agencies with multiple managers

business.name: Business
business.description: For large agencies with full automation needs

testimonials.title: Trusted by travel agencies
testimonials.subtitle: See what our pilot partners say about Trip Assistant.
testimonials.comingSoon: Testimonials from pilot agencies coming soon

items.quote: Our managers used to spend 3 hours a day answering the same questions. Now the bot handles 80% of them automatically.
items.author: Pilot Agency

items.quote: Tourists love getting instant answers at 2 AM. Our response time went from hours to seconds.
items.author: Pilot Agency

items.quote: The setup took 15 minutes. We imported our trips and the bot was ready. Incredibly simple.
items.author: Pilot Agency

contact.title: Ready to save your team hours every week?
contact.subtitle: Request a demo and we'll show you how Trip Assistant works for your agency.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.description: AI-powered travel assistant for agencies. Automate tourist communication via Telegram & WhatsApp.
